original_image_tags: Scan of a worn, tan-colored FBI file jacket or folder cover. The surface is covered with multiple stamps, labels, and annotations in red, black, and blue ink.

elements.description: An image of a brown paper file folder with various stamped and printed text elements. Visible text includes large orange letters 'AL BUREAU OF TIGATION QUARTERS', 'DO NOT DESTROY' stamps, a barcode label with 'RRP003HX15', a white label with 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER', 'HQ - HEADQUARTERS', 'Class/Case # 0062 83894', 'Serial # 52', a red handwritten 'X' in a box, and a blue sticker stating 'Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.' Also visible is 'SECRET' stamped in red and 'Transfer - Call 3421' in orange.

judge.reason: Description B quotes multiple specific, structured text elements (e.g., 'Class/Case # 0062 83894', 'Serial # 52', a full declassification authority statement) that Description A does not mention at all, and Description A's claim of stamps in 'red, black, and blue ink' directly contradicts B's specific 'orange letters' and 'red handwritten X'.
